rules.fill: next 1m open after signal + adverse + TradeCostEngine

A.regime_definition: TREND if day (high-low)/open% >= sample median else RANGE

B.regime_definition: TREND if day (high-low)/open% >= sample median else RANGE

reasons: THESIS: explore→confirm success=0% — B mainly avoids A's overtrading, not validated early capture

note: Naver fchart provides ~10 overlapping real 1m sessions; remaining days are daily-anchored synthetic 1m cached under data/cache/replay_*.csv to reach >=20. Sibling reentry compare should reuse dates.
